feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1776 201 1575 77
US 1639 176 1463 61

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Computer Basics: PC Guide
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

The application contains a variety of articles and tips for anyone who works with computer technology or is simply interested in it. It is divided into three sections: 1. Hardware 2. PC assembly 3. Software The Hardware section contains information about all computer components, peripherals, and other equipment. The basic theory of computer parts is explained in simple language. Here you will find articles about% the motherboard, central processor, RAM, graphics card, and other hardware. Hardware topics include: • Motherboard, central processing unit, random access memory, power supply unit, graphics card, optical disk drive, sound card, cooling systems, computer cases • Hard disk drives (HDD), solid-state drives (SSD), optical disks, USB flash drives • Keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, image scanners • Monitors, speakers, headphones, printers, projectors • Network interface controllers, routers, mobile broadband modems • Gaming devices, uninterruptible power supplies, peripheral connectors The PC assembly section offers step-by-step guides and illustrated instructions on how to build your own computer or replace its components. Detailed diagrams and pictures will help you understand how to assemble a PC, install or upgrade equipment, and fit components. PC assembly topics include: • Motherboard installation • CPU installation • Applying and replacing thermal paste • Installing a graphics card, RAM modules, power supply, air cooling system, sound card, SSD, or HDD The Software section provides information about computer operating systems and the basic programs that most PC users work with. Software topics include: • Operating systems • Essential programs This application is ideal for anyone who wants to improve or refresh their knowledge of computer technology. After completing the course, you will be able to assemble your own computer or upgrade it confidently. The app contains more than 50 articles and includes a search function for terms and definitions. We regularly update the course on computer fundamentals. You can also report errors or suggest improvements.

entry.title: Everybody's RPG: Reboot
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Starter Package B：$29.99
  • Daily Jewel Package：$19.99
  • Lite Daily Jewel Package：$6.99
  • Starter Package A：$24.99
  • Remove AD：$6.99
  • Jewel Package D：$34.99
  • Jewel Package A：$4.99
  • Jewel Package F：$79.99
  • Jewel Package C：$17.99
  • Jewel Package B：$9.99

Application Description

Recruit legendary heroes and conquer endless stages! From auto battles to mining and upgrading! A true idle fantasy RPG that keeps growing even when you're away! * Build strategic teams with unique and powerful heroes! * Mine resources through the mining system! Get everything you need to craft gear! * Challenge powerful bosses and claim legendary rewards! * Progress automatically — perfect for busy players! * Tons of content: dungeons, relics, evolution, legendary equipment, and more! Download now and begin writing your own legend! Start playing now and collect your heroes!

entry.title: Earnifi: Early Pay. Fast Money
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

EARNIFI – EARLY WAGE ACCESS, CASH ADVANCE APP & PAYDAY LOAN ALTERNATIVE Earnifi is an early wage access app and an alternative for cash advance app, and payday loan built for hourly workers, shift workers, renters, and early-career professionals who need fast cash and instant pay without high-interest loans. Get early pay using money you’ve already earned. No payday loans. No installment loans. No credit checks. No interest. No hidden fees or tipping. If payday feels too far away, Earnifi helps you access your earned wages early, safely, transparently, and on your terms. EARLY WAGE ACCESS & INSTANT PAY Earnifi provides early wage access so you can cover rent, bills, groceries, and everyday expenses without relying on payday loan apps, personal loans, or high-cost cash advances. We verify payroll across 1,900+ payroll platforms and 40+ Time & Attendance systems, covering nearly 85% of U.S. workers. WITH EARNIFI, YOU CAN: • Access earned wages early • Get fast cash when you need it • Use instant pay or free ACH transfer • Avoid payday loans and credit checks Choose instant cash advance with optional instant transfers, or use the free plan and receive funds in 1–3 business days. A SMART CASH ADVANCE ALTERNATIVE Earnifi is a cash advance alternative designed for real pay schedules, including hourly pay, shift work, and fixed salary cycles. USE EARNIFI TO: • Cover rent deposits and monthly rent • Pay utilities, Wi-Fi, groceries, and transportation • Handle emergencies between paychecks • Avoid overdraft fees and late payments • Sync bills with your paycheck PRICING & SUBSCRIPTION – SIMPLE AND OPTIONAL Earnifi is free to download and use. No subscription is required for early wage access. FREE PLAN: • Salary advance delivered in 1–3 business days • No credit check, no interest, no tipping OPTIONAL INSTANT PAY PLAN: • $4.50 per pay cycle • Instant pay with money delivered in minutes • Cancel anytime NO FEES. NO INTEREST. NO CREDIT CHECK APP. Earnifi is built around transparency: • No credit checks • No tipping • No late fees • No collections Earnifi advances are non-recourse and are not payday loans, personal loans, cash loans, or installment loans. SECURITY & PRIVACY • Secure bank connections powered by Plaid • 256-bit bank-level encryption • Works with thousands of U.S. banks AVAILABILITY & DISCLOSURES Pay Advance: Not all users will qualify. Subject to eligibility, Earnifi approval, and applicable policies. Advance amounts typically range from $25 to $500. Availability and limits may vary by state. Instant transfers to debit cards may incur an optional subscription fee. Standard ACH transfers are available at no cost. Earnifi pay advances have no mandatory minimum or maximum repayment period. Advances carry no maximum interest. No origination fees, no processing fees, and no mandatory transfer fees apply to the advance itself Pay advance services are not available in: California, Colorado, Connecticut, District of Columbia, Indiana, Kansas, Maryland, Minnesota, Missouri, Nevada, New York, South Carolina, Utah, and Vermont. Earnifi helps you get fast cash, early pay, and instant wage access—without debt, pressure, or payday loans.

entry.title: Be Focused Pro - Focus Timer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$12.99 → $7.99 [Free ~ $12.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$7.99

Application Description

Staying on task seems is a real challenge for our screen-bound generation. The Be Focused lets you get things done by breaking up individual tasks among discrete intervals, separated by short breaks. It’s a surprisingly effective way to retain motivation and focus. Create tasks, configure breaks and track your progress throughout the day, week or custom period. Use Be Focused on your iPhone, iPad, or Mac — everything stays perfectly in sync. Task Management • Create and manage tasks • Add notes and due dates to tasks • Organize tasks with tags and filters • Paste task lists from other apps Timer Control • Start, pause, or skip intervals • Auto-start the next interval (optionally) • Plan intervals needed for task completion and track accuracy • Manage completed intervals Timer Customization • Set durations for work sessions, short and long breaks • Define number of intervals before a long break • Set a daily goal for completed intervals • Assign different timer settings to individual tasks Reports • View detailed reports to monitor your progress • Export your data in CSV format Sounds and Notifications • Chronometer ticking sound with adjustable frequency • Variety of alarm sounds • Interactive notifications • Adjustable volume for alarms and chronometer Integration • Sync across all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac) * • Integration with Focus Matrix to manage tasks using urgent/important principle ** • Integration with Shortcuts app to automate workflow Quick Access • Widgets for Lock Screen and Home Screen • Live activities for Lock Screen and Dynamic Island • Control to start or stop the timer from the Lock Screen, Controls Center, or Action Button Automation • Integration with Shortcuts app (control tasks and timers via Shortcuts app) • Automate Shortcuts execution on events in Be Focused app Device Support • Apple Watch support • Also available for Mac • Dark and Light mode support * Sync with Mac requires Be Focused Pro for macOS, sold separately. ** Integration with Focus Matrix requires the Pro version of Focus Matrix, sold separately.

entry.title: Auto Redial App
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Weekly Subscription：$2.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $2.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Pro – Lifetime：$0.00
  • Weekly Subscription：$1.99
  • Yearly Subscription：$24.99

Application Description

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs. This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy. Main Features: - Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls. - Set number of retries and time intervals. - Schedule calls in advance via calendar. - Add extensions automatically after dialing. - Enable vibration before each redial. - Call history and retry stats. Perfect for: - Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.) - Customer service or tech support - Calling public offices - Freelancers and business owners following up clients Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Seoul Exorcist 1111: Roguelite
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$5.99 → $3.99 [$3.99 ~ $5.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

In-App Purchases

  • 200,000 x Coins：$9.99
  • 80,000 x Coins：$4.99
  • 40,000 x Coins：$2.99
  • 10,000 x Coins：$0.99

Application Description

Think Fast, Strike Faster! As the ultimate exorcist, choose your attacks wisely, upgrade combat deck, combine traits and items, and save the cursed souls—before death finds you. ▪ Real-Time Turn-Based Combat Enemies react the moment you make a decision—! Fast, tense action with every move. ▪ 4 Characters with Unique Strategies Each with 8 uniques attack types, exclusive animations, and 2 passive traits. Adapt your playstyle for every run. ▪ Time Limit - Think Fast, Strike Faster! You have just 7 minutes to defeat all enemies in each run. You've been relentlessly trained for this moment. ▪ Item & Trait Combinations Strategic synergies that activate automatically during battle. Timing and adaptability are the keys to victory! ▪ Roguelite Clear all 7 maps and the boss in a single run—or get reset! But clearing the same map 3 times unlocks progress. Collect coins, build a stronger deck, and dive back in! ▪ 12 Languages Supported  Korean, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, and Russian. ▪ Offline Game All data is stored locally. No network required. Be Aware. Uninstalling the app will erase saved data. ▪Discord https://discord.gg/UaZApdWG93 ▪For inquires / bug report snowgames0629@gmail.com
